basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 14-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit 28 years, relaxed by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female and 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer).
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PWD/Female: 5 years OBC (Non-creamy layer): 3 years

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech with a first-class (or equivalent CGPA) in chemical engineering or allied engineering disciplines or M.Sc. in Chemistry, Physics, Biophysics, Bioinformatics, or Biochemistry from a recognized University or Institute with a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET (including lectureship) score.

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000/- per month for Year 1 & 2, INR 42,000/- per month for Year 3
salary_details.details: Year 1 & 2: INR 37,000/- per month Year 3: INR 42,000/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Online Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech degree in chemical engineering or allied disciplines, or an M.Sc. in Chemistry, Physics, Biophysics, Bioinformatics, or Biochemistry with a valid GATE/CSIR-UGC NET score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for OBC candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 3 years for OBC (Non-creamy layer) candidates, in addition to the general upper age limit.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The salary is INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on shortlisting according to the project's needs and merit, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. No hard copies are required.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, mark sheets, research papers (if any), and work experience certificates (if any).

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITR/SR/2026/Advt.-26CH024.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
